description: Converts a list of Affymetrix Hu6800/Hu35KsubA probes to the corresponding Affymetrix U95Av2 probes.
author: Justin Lamb (gp-help@broad.mit.edu)
plan:
## Hu68kHu35kAtoU95 GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Hu68kHu35kAtoU95 is a GenePattern module that Converts a list of Affymetrix Hu6800/Hu35KsubA probes to the corresponding Affymetrix U95Av2 probes.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 2 parameters:
- Required: input.filename, output
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<perl> <libdir>GCM_to_U95.pl <input.filename> <output> <libdir>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.filename
parameters.description: the .pol, .tag or .grp file to be converted

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: name of the output file (same format as input file)
